title: Lidar systems and methods
abstract: A Lidar system is provided. The Lidar system may comprise: a plurality of light sources (2011) configured to emit a plurality of light beams (144), the plurality of light sources (2011) are mounted to a first mounting apparatus comprising a cooling feature; a plurality of optical fiber elements (202), wherein each of the plurality of light sources (2011) is optically coupled to an input end of one or more optical fiber elements (202) from the plurality of optical fiber elements (202); and a second mounting apparatus (203) comprising at least one mounting unit (204) coupled to an emitting end of the plurality of optical fiber elements (202), wherein the at least one mounting unit (204) is configured to control an output direction of the plurality of light beams (144) individually, and a distribution pattern of the plurality of light beams (144) emitted from the emitting end of the plurality of optical fiber elements (202).
